title: The Five Suns: Complete Cosmological Cycle
description: The complete Aztec creation cycle: four previous worlds destroyed by jaguars, wind, fire, and flood before our current Fifth Sun.
introduction: The complete Aztec creation cycle: four previous worlds destroyed by jaguars, wind, fire, and flood before our current Fifth Sun.

translation.original_text: Inic ce tonatiuh, naui ocelotl. In tonatiuh naui ocelotl.
translation.text: The first sun, Four-Jaguar. The sun called Four-Jaguar.
